title: High resolution tissue and cell type identification via single cell transcriptomic profiling.
author: Liu M Zheng S Li H Budowle B Wang L Lou Z Ge J
content: S-EPMC11940611 PMC11940611 High resolution tissue and cell type identification via single cell transcriptomic profiling.
